title: ASR Outdoor Compact 50 Lumens Survival Emergency Mini Zipper Light Keychain
description:
Be prepared when you’re camping, hunting or hiking on your favorite local trail, with the ASR Outdoor Compact 50 Lumens Rechargeable Survival Mini Zipper Keychain Light Tool! Yes, it might be small and compact at 1.5 inches long but, the mini zipper light still provides a strong 50 lumens of brightness that you can easily carry with you without any extra added weight or bulk to your person or gear. And, not to mention, if your flashlight, headlamp, lantern or other light sources fails, you can always rely on this little light with 90 minutes of run time (30 minutes to charge; USB cable included with purchase) to get you to where you need to go

ASR Outdoor Compact 50 Lumens Survival Emergency Mini Zipper Light Keychain

Be prepared when you’re camping, hunting or hiking on your favorite local trail, with the ASR Outdoor Compact 50 Lumens Rechargeable Survival Mini Zipper Keychain Light Tool!

Key Features

  • 50 LUMENS SURVIVAL LIGHT: A handy backup mini flashlight, the ASR Outdoor mini rechargeable zipper light easily attaches to the zipper of your jacket, backpack, purse or bag; easily turns on 5o lumens of brightness with an integrated on/off switch button on the top of the mini zipper flashlight
  • MULTIPURPOSE LIGHT TOOL: The emergency mini flashlight is not only exclusive for survival and outdoor excursion purposes, but can also be attached to the zipper of any bag in order to help locate the contents; to a dog collar if you’re walking after hours or to keychain or key ring to help you find a lock in the dark; also a great item to add to a bug out bag, survival kit or vehicle emergency preparedness tote
  • SLIM, SMALL & COMPACT DESIGN: Measuring only 1.5 inches in length, the compact flashlight easily secures to a lanyard clip, key ring or the zipper of a bag, backpack or jacket via the keychain clip; Weighing just 0.9 ounces or 0.056 pounds, the mini zipper flashlight adds no extra weight or bulk to your outdoor gear
  • RECHARGEABLE BATTERY: Featuring a 50mAh 501015 Lithium Battery, this small but powerful mini zipper flashlight will give you 90 minutes of light; charge time is 30 minutes; USB cable included
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Weight: 0.9 ounces (oz); Dimensions: 1.5 inches x 0.75 inches x 0.5 inches; Rechargeable 50Mah 501015 Lithium Battery; Bulb Power: 50 Lumen/0.5W SMD Bulb; Color: Black; Brightness: 50 Lumens

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BLKZPL50
  • UPC: 810058488787
  • Color: Black
  • Size: Small

Yes, it might be small and compact at 1.5 inches long but, the mini zipper light still provides a strong 50 lumens of brightness that you can easily carry with you without any extra added weight or bulk to your person or gear. And, not to mention, if your flashlight, headlamp, lantern or other light sources fails, you can always rely on this little light with 90 minutes of run time (30 minutes to charge; USB cable included with purchase) to get you to where you need to go.

Easy to use, the mini rechargeable zipper flashlight easily attaches to the zipper of your jacket, backpack, purse or bag; the light is activated by simply hitting the integrated on/off switch button on the top of the mini zipper light device tool. And, notably, the mini zipper flashlight is not only exclusively used for survival and outdoor excursion purposes, but can also be attached to the zipper of any bag in order to help locate the contents; to a dog collar if you’re walking after hours or to keychain; or to a key ring to help you find a lock in the dark. The mini zipper keychain light is also a great item to add to any bug out bag, survival kit or vehicle emergency preparedness tote.

Whether walking your dog after hours, making your way to the bathroom at your campsite, hiking in low light or reading in your tent, never be without light with the ASR Outdoor Compact 50 Lumens Rechargeable Survival Mini Zipper Keychain Light Tool! Multifunctional, low maintenance, lightweight and easy to tote, the mini zipper flashlight will come in handy in a myriad of outdoor or recreational activities.
